---
title: "CV"
---

## Education

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2023–2026
:::
::: {.cv-body}
**PhD in Mathematics**, University of Stuttgart

::: {.cv-meta}
::: {.cv-meta-label}
Advisor
:::
::: {.cv-meta-value}
Marco Oesting
:::
:::

::: {.cv-meta}
::: {.cv-meta-label}
Topic
:::
::: {.cv-meta-value}
Long memory in extreme value analysis
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2020–2023
:::
::: {.cv-body}
**MSc in Mathematics**, University of Stuttgart

::: {.cv-meta}
::: {.cv-meta-label}
Advisor
:::
::: {.cv-meta-value}
Jürgen Dippon
:::
:::

::: {.cv-meta}
::: {.cv-meta-label}
Thesis
:::
::: {.cv-meta-value}
A novel weighted mean approach to estimate the distribution function of potential outcomes in observational studies—an asymptotic analysis
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2016–2020
:::
::: {.cv-body}
**BSc in Mathematics**, University of Stuttgart
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2013–2018
:::
::: {.cv-body}
**BMus in Church Music**, HMDK Stuttgart
:::
:::

## Work

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-date}
2023–present
:::
::: {.cv-body}
**Research Assistant**, Institute of Stochastics and Applications, University of Stuttgart
:::
:::
